top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Eye Gains as US Posts Stellar Quarter: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks were set to rise Wednesday after US equities capped their best quarter in six years, as a rally in chipmakers and signs of economic resilience boosted optimism over corporate earnings.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum Boom With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal
top_signals.summary: Alcoa Corp. agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in Australia, Brazil and South Africa in a deal valued at as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position among the world’s largest aluminum producers as long-term demand strengthens.

top_signals.title: August Marks First Month With No Scheduled Brent Crude Cargoes
top_signals.summary: No cargoes of North Sea Brent crude oil are scheduled to load in August as production steadily declines, traders told Reuters on Tuesday, marking a milestone for the global Dated Brent oil benchmark, which prices over 60% of the world's oil.Brent…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: PH7 secures C$5M from Natural Resources Canada for copper extraction technology
top_signals.summary: Tech will trial at Gibraltar mine in British Columbia, Canada’s second largest open-pit copper operation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Rafael Nadal talks tennis prize money, his hotels, and what sports taught him about business
top_signals.summary: Rafael Nadal opened his fourth Zel hotel as he expands into hospitality, education and sports after retiring from tennis.

top_signals.title: President Trump’s financial disclosures show hundreds of millions in crypto-related income
top_signals.summary: Trump disclosed over $65 million from equity sales and $236 million in World Liberty token proceeds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
